---
title: "Thalaba the Destroyer: A Metrical Romance"
---

## Thalaba the Destroyer: A Metrical Romance

**Author:** Robert Southey
**Date:** 1801
**Imprint:** London and Bristol: Longman and Rees

### Notes

See also [[person:1722]Robert Southey].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
